blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 58°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: light rain showers, highs of 61°F.
